001package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus;
002
003import org.apache.commons.lang3.Validate;
004import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic;
005import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.Message;
006import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType;
007import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.annotations.MessageProps;
008import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.helpers.Bytes;
009import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.PumpVersionBRequest;
010
011/**
012 * Response message for {@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.PumpVersionBRequest}, opCode -123, size 60
013 *
014 * <br>
015 *
016 * 
017 * <table border='1'>
018 * <caption>Message properties:</caption>
019 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>opCode</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>-123</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
020 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>size</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>60</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
021 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>type</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType#RESPONSE}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
022 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>characteristic</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic#CURRENT_STATUS}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
023 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>request</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.PumpVersionBRequest}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
024 * </table>
025 */
026@MessageProps(
027    opCode=-123,
028    size=60,
029    type=MessageType.RESPONSE,
030    characteristic=Characteristic.CURRENT_STATUS,
031    request=PumpVersionBRequest.class
032)
033public class PumpVersionBResponse extends Message {
034    private String softwareName;
035    private long configurationBitsA;
036    private long configurationBitsB;
037    private long serialNumber;
038    private long modelNumber;
039    private String pumpRevision;
040    private long pcbPartNumberA;
041    private long pcbSerialNumberA;
042    private String pcbRevisionNumberA;
043
044    public PumpVersionBResponse() {}
045
046    public PumpVersionBResponse(String softwareName, long configurationBitsA, long configurationBitsB,
047                                long serialNumber, long modelNumber, String pumpRevision,
048                                long pcbPartNumberA, long pcbSerialNumberA, String pcbRevisionNumberA) {
049        this.cargo = buildCargo(softwareName, configurationBitsA, configurationBitsB, serialNumber,
050            modelNumber, pumpRevision, pcbPartNumberA, pcbSerialNumberA, pcbRevisionNumberA);
051        this.softwareName = softwareName;
052        this.configurationBitsA = configurationBitsA;
053        this.configurationBitsB = configurationBitsB;
054        this.serialNumber = serialNumber;
055        this.modelNumber = modelNumber;
056        this.pumpRevision = pumpRevision;
057        this.pcbPartNumberA = pcbPartNumberA;
058        this.pcbSerialNumberA = pcbSerialNumberA;
059        this.pcbRevisionNumberA = pcbRevisionNumberA;
060    }
061
062    /**
063     * <table border="1">
064     * <caption>Parsed fields for PumpVersionBResponse:</caption>
065     * <tr><td><code>softwareName</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readString(raw, 0, 20)</code></td></tr>
066     * <tr><td><code>configurationBitsA</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 20)</code></td></tr>
067     * <tr><td><code>configurationBitsB</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 24)</code></td></tr>
068     * <tr><td><code>serialNumber</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 28)</code></td></tr>
069     * <tr><td><code>modelNumber</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 32)</code></td></tr>
070     * <tr><td><code>pumpRevision</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readString(raw, 36, 8)</code></td></tr>
071     * <tr><td><code>pcbPartNumberA</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 44)</code></td></tr>
072     * <tr><td><code>pcbSerialNumberA</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 48)</code></td></tr>
073     * <tr><td><code>pcbRevisionNumberA</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readString(raw, 52, 8)</code></td></tr>
074     * </table>
075     */
076    public void parse(byte[] raw) {
077        Validate.isTrue(raw.length == props().size());
078        this.cargo = raw;
079        this.softwareName = Bytes.readString(raw, 0, 20);
080        this.configurationBitsA = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 20);
081        this.configurationBitsB = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 24);
082        this.serialNumber = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 28);
083        this.modelNumber = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 32);
084        this.pumpRevision = Bytes.readString(raw, 36, 8);
085        this.pcbPartNumberA = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 44);
086        this.pcbSerialNumberA = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 48);
087        this.pcbRevisionNumberA = Bytes.readString(raw, 52, 8);
088    }
089
090    /**
091     * <table border="1">
092     * <caption>Byte layout for PumpVersionBResponse.buildCargo(...):</caption>
093     * <tr><th>Offset</th><th>Description</th></tr>
094     * <tr><td>0</td><td><code>writeString(softwareName, 20) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
095     * <tr><td>1</td><td><code>writeString(softwareName, 20) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
096     * <tr><td>2</td><td><code>writeString(softwareName, 20) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
097     * <tr><td>3</td><td><code>writeString(softwareName, 20) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
098     * <tr><td>4</td><td><code>writeString(softwareName, 20) [byte 4]</code></td></tr>
099     * <tr><td>5</td><td><code>writeString(softwareName, 20) [byte 5]</code></td></tr>
100     * <tr><td>6</td><td><code>writeString(softwareName, 20) [byte 6]</code></td></tr>
101     * <tr><td>7</td><td><code>writeString(softwareName, 20) [byte 7]</code></td></tr>
102     * <tr><td>8</td><td><code>writeString(softwareName, 20) [byte 8]</code></td></tr>
103     * <tr><td>9</td><td><code>writeString(softwareName, 20) [byte 9]</code></td></tr>
104     * <tr><td>10</td><td><code>writeString(softwareName, 20) [byte 10]</code></td></tr>
105     * <tr><td>11</td><td><code>writeString(softwareName, 20) [byte 11]</code></td></tr>
106     * <tr><td>12</td><td><code>writeString(softwareName, 20) [byte 12]</code></td></tr>
107     * <tr><td>13</td><td><code>writeString(softwareName, 20) [byte 13]</code></td></tr>
108     * <tr><td>14</td><td><code>writeString(softwareName, 20) [byte 14]</code></td></tr>
109     * <tr><td>15</td><td><code>writeString(softwareName, 20) [byte 15]</code></td></tr>
110     * <tr><td>16</td><td><code>writeString(softwareName, 20) [byte 16]</code></td></tr>
111     * <tr><td>17</td><td><code>writeString(softwareName, 20) [byte 17]</code></td></tr>
112     * <tr><td>18</td><td><code>writeString(softwareName, 20) [byte 18]</code></td></tr>
113     * <tr><td>19</td><td><code>writeString(softwareName, 20) [byte 19]</code></td></tr>
114     * <tr><td>20</td><td><code>toUint32(configurationBitsA) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
115     * <tr><td>21</td><td><code>toUint32(configurationBitsA) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
116     * <tr><td>22</td><td><code>toUint32(configurationBitsA) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
117     * <tr><td>23</td><td><code>toUint32(configurationBitsA) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
118     * <tr><td>24</td><td><code>toUint32(configurationBitsB) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
119     * <tr><td>25</td><td><code>toUint32(configurationBitsB) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
120     * <tr><td>26</td><td><code>toUint32(configurationBitsB) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
121     * <tr><td>27</td><td><code>toUint32(configurationBitsB) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
122     * <tr><td>28</td><td><code>toUint32(serialNumber) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
123     * <tr><td>29</td><td><code>toUint32(serialNumber) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
124     * <tr><td>30</td><td><code>toUint32(serialNumber) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
125     * <tr><td>31</td><td><code>toUint32(serialNumber) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
126     * <tr><td>32</td><td><code>toUint32(modelNumber) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
127     * <tr><td>33</td><td><code>toUint32(modelNumber) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
128     * <tr><td>34</td><td><code>toUint32(modelNumber) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
129     * <tr><td>35</td><td><code>toUint32(modelNumber) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
130     * <tr><td>36</td><td><code>writeString(pumpRevision, 8) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
131     * <tr><td>37</td><td><code>writeString(pumpRevision, 8) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
132     * <tr><td>38</td><td><code>writeString(pumpRevision, 8) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
133     * <tr><td>39</td><td><code>writeString(pumpRevision, 8) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
134     * <tr><td>40</td><td><code>writeString(pumpRevision, 8) [byte 4]</code></td></tr>
135     * <tr><td>41</td><td><code>writeString(pumpRevision, 8) [byte 5]</code></td></tr>
136     * <tr><td>42</td><td><code>writeString(pumpRevision, 8) [byte 6]</code></td></tr>
137     * <tr><td>43</td><td><code>writeString(pumpRevision, 8) [byte 7]</code></td></tr>
138     * <tr><td>44</td><td><code>toUint32(pcbPartNumberA) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
139     * <tr><td>45</td><td><code>toUint32(pcbPartNumberA) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
140     * <tr><td>46</td><td><code>toUint32(pcbPartNumberA) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
141     * <tr><td>47</td><td><code>toUint32(pcbPartNumberA) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
142     * <tr><td>48</td><td><code>toUint32(pcbSerialNumberA) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
143     * <tr><td>49</td><td><code>toUint32(pcbSerialNumberA) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
144     * <tr><td>50</td><td><code>toUint32(pcbSerialNumberA) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
145     * <tr><td>51</td><td><code>toUint32(pcbSerialNumberA) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
146     * <tr><td>52</td><td><code>writeString(pcbRevisionNumberA, 8) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
147     * <tr><td>53</td><td><code>writeString(pcbRevisionNumberA, 8) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
148     * <tr><td>54</td><td><code>writeString(pcbRevisionNumberA, 8) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
149     * <tr><td>55</td><td><code>writeString(pcbRevisionNumberA, 8) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
150     * <tr><td>56</td><td><code>writeString(pcbRevisionNumberA, 8) [byte 4]</code></td></tr>
151     * <tr><td>57</td><td><code>writeString(pcbRevisionNumberA, 8) [byte 5]</code></td></tr>
152     * <tr><td>58</td><td><code>writeString(pcbRevisionNumberA, 8) [byte 6]</code></td></tr>
153     * <tr><td>59</td><td><code>writeString(pcbRevisionNumberA, 8) [byte 7]</code></td></tr>
154     * </table>
155     */
156    public static byte[] buildCargo(String softwareName, long configurationBitsA, long configurationBitsB,
157                                    long serialNumber, long modelNumber, String pumpRevision,
158                                    long pcbPartNumberA, long pcbSerialNumberA, String pcbRevisionNumberA) {
159        return Bytes.combine(
160            Bytes.writeString(softwareName, 20),
161            Bytes.toUint32(configurationBitsA),
162            Bytes.toUint32(configurationBitsB),
163            Bytes.toUint32(serialNumber),
164            Bytes.toUint32(modelNumber),
165            Bytes.writeString(pumpRevision, 8),
166            Bytes.toUint32(pcbPartNumberA),
167            Bytes.toUint32(pcbSerialNumberA),
168            Bytes.writeString(pcbRevisionNumberA, 8));
169    }
170
171    public String getSoftwareName() {
172        return softwareName;
173    }
174
175    public long getConfigurationBitsA() {
176        return configurationBitsA;
177    }
178
179    public long getConfigurationBitsB() {
180        return configurationBitsB;
181    }
182
183    public long getSerialNumber() {
184        return serialNumber;
185    }
186
187    public long getModelNumber() {
188        return modelNumber;
189    }
190
191    public String getPumpRevision() {
192        return pumpRevision;
193    }
194
195    public long getPcbPartNumberA() {
196        return pcbPartNumberA;
197    }
198
199    public long getPcbSerialNumberA() {
200        return pcbSerialNumberA;
201    }
202
203    public String getPcbRevisionNumberA() {
204        return pcbRevisionNumberA;
205    }
206}
